reason: The image contains elements that are potentially anachronistic and some aspects of the clothing and car interior appear too modern for 1960. While the suits and general attire of the men are plausible, the car models in the background seem too modern for the time period. The overall aesthetic of the image has a modern photography look and feel, the materials of the seat interior seem slightly off for a car interior from 1960. Additionally the presence of the car headrest is unlikely. The buildings in the back are also very tall suggesting they might be newer buildings. The overall impression is that while the scene attempts to depict 1960, it leans too much into modern materials and architectural styles.
